issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderIsName' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if your Leader IS Emporio.Ivankov, not if the card is on board.
Third action missing count specification. Should be 'count':3 for 'trash up to 3 cards', not an open-ended trash.
First TrashFromHand has empty thenActions array; should be omitted or clarified that second action is sequential, not conditional.
